What's New In rPickle 0.17
====================================

:Release: 2026-07-22
:Version: 0.17.1

Architecture Refactor
---------------------

- ``core.py`` reduced to a pure dispatcher — all protocol implementations removed
- Hardcoded ``match protocol`` replaced with ``importlib`` dynamic loading
- v4 protocol moved to ``pcls/core_p4.py``
- All historical protocols (v1–v4) now live in ``pcls/``
- Adding a new protocol only requires adding ``pcls/core_pX.py`` — no changes to ``core.py``

New Features
------------

- :class:`rPickle.set_max_size_ctx` — context manager for temporary size limits
- :func:`rPickle.dis` — disassembler for human-readable rPickle bytecode

Removals
--------

- ``rPickle.ext.defaultdict_ext`` (deprecated in 0.16.0)

Testing & Coverage
------------------

- 98 tests, all passing
- ``core.py``, ``ext.py``, ``pcls/core_p4.py`` at 100% coverage
